goal: Visit this page, take a screenshot, rate the design /10 as a senior product designer. Note 2 concrete defects. This is cloud.tangle.tools — a dark-themed blockchain services dashboard. One-line verdict per page.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this dark-themed blockchain services dashboard Operators page out of 10. Assess: visual hierarchy, consistency, typography/readability, spacing, color contrast, empty state quality (if present), navigation active state visibility, overall polish. Identify 2 specific design defects with concrete examples.

steps.expectedEffect: Receive a detailed design evaluation with rating out of 10, identifying 2 concrete defects specific to the Operators page layout, navigation affordances, empty state design, and visual hierarchy
